scope: Schema-convergence strategy options for Stage B collapse-detector metric contract.

options.label: threshold_profile_update_only
options.summary: Update threshold profile metric_catalog paths to live eval-summary fields where exact equivalents exist; keep missing metrics noncomputable.
risk_notes: Leaves 4 core metrics noncomputable (read_file exact, read_file symbol-name, no_anchor share, direct_answer substitution).
Can create false sense of closure because detector runs but remains partially blind.

options.label: detector_alias_layer
options.summary: Add detector-level alias mapping from legacy metric IDs to live schema IDs (and possibly proxies) without changing profile or eval outputs.
risk_notes: Alias/proxy logic can hide semantic drift if mappings are not one-to-one.
Harder to audit than explicit profile/eval contract updates.

options.label: eval_summary_emission_expansion
options.summary: Expand canonical eval summary emission to include the missing governance metrics explicitly (read_file exact-valid, symbol-name exact-valid, no-anchor share, direct-answer substitution count).
risk_notes: Preserves metric semantics explicitly instead of inferring proxies.
Requires evaluator changes and regeneration of summaries for full utility.

options.label: hybrid_convergence
options.summary: Short-term profile path updates for exact live equivalents plus medium-term eval emission expansion for missing semantic metrics; keep noncomputable governance halting until full convergence.
risk_notes: Avoids proxy shortcuts while restoring partial computability quickly.
Retains conservative noncomputable halt behavior during transition.
